fieldDescription: Controls generation of the Breh'Inni system and Junk Pirate core worlds in non-Nex random sectors.

Allows Junk Pirate explorer fleets to spawn from Junk Pirate worlds.

Enables procgen Pre-PACK anarchist systems, spinerettes, derelicts, and ship graveyards.

Chance to skip eligible constellations after the minimum has been generated. Lower values create more Junk Pirates procgen content.
